article.title: Uber SDE-2 Interview Experience
article.content:
I was approached by the recruiter directly for SDE-2 backend role at Uber and interviews were scheduled after a week's time.

### CodeSignal OA
4 questions asked with easy to medium-hard difficulty. Was able to solve all 4 completely.

### **Round 1 — Phone Screen (DSA)**

Was asked this question with a little modification: 
https://leetcode.com/problems/find-the-closest-palindrome/description/

### **Round 2 - Coding (DSA)**
1. Given a sorted array in non-decreasing order, sort the numbers in order of the value of their squares -> O(N) solution expected using 2 pointers.

2. https://leetcode.com/problems/first-unique-number/description/ -> O(1) solution expected using DLL

### **Round 3 - Coding (LLD)**
Was expected to code classes and services for Car Inventory management service and Reservation management.

### **Round 4 - HLD**
Design a system to notify users when a certain stock price changes by a given delta. 

### **Round 5 - Managerial and Leadership**
Standard managerial round questions which I had to answer on the basis of situations I have faced or hypothetically if I face. 

---



Solving previously asked questions and Interview Experiences from Leetcode really helped.

**Verdict - Selected**

post.content: Congrats on the offer. Can you tell us the number of LC questions you have solved and your contest rating as that would help us assess the expected level we need to be at to crack these companies
Congrats brother! Thanks for the post
Hi Congrats on offer \nAfter how many days you got decision after HM round ? Did they gave verbal offer first ?
Congrats on the offer, \nCan you please tell questions of OA if you remember by chance.\nThank you.
Did you give it in Go?\n
Were there any questions based on Design in the Phone Screen, or was it purely based on DSA ?
YOE? Current exp at MNC? CP ratings?
Which programming language did you use for LLD? Is Python allowed for LLD rounds?

Did you applied via naukri or via some portal ? Or coldmailed / asked someone like employee/HR for referral ? I see getting direct HRs message for interview is rare. What do you think what was it in your resume that you got recruiter\'s attention ? Thanks in advance
